widgetTool.name: file_type_picker
widgetTool.description: Used to upload files to GCS bucket

actions.description: Required. An ordered list of individual actions to be displayed.

content.description: Required. The visible text content displayed on the action item (e.g., "Explore AI tools in Google Workspace", "View Order").

description.description: A brief explanation of what the action performs, providing additional context to the user.

utterance.description: The exact text string sent to the agent as a user message when the action is selected.
